testcase.name: validate_search_product_with_description_functionality

failure.message: Product having the given text in its description should be displayed in the search results expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Product having the given text in its description should be displayed in the search results expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at
